source_intake_record.raw_question_text:
Sets A and B, shown in the venn diagram, have the same number of elements. Thier union has 2007 elements and their intersection has 1001 elements. Find the number of elements in A.

<image1>

image_dependency: Question explicitly mentions a Venn diagram and input marks requires_image=true.
However, the text itself provides all needed quantities (same size, union 2007, intersection 1001), so solving does not appear to require visual details.
asset_registry_record.registry_passed=true and one readable image is present, but the reasoning is largely text/math driven.
multi_step: Requires combining at least two conditions: |A|=|B| and |A union B|=|A|+|B|-|A intersection B|.
Solver must set up an equation from the union/intersection counts and then solve for the shared set size.
Multiple-choice format does not remove the need for algebraic reasoning.
verifiability: Expected output is a single numeric value, which is easy to check with a deterministic formula.
The problem statement gives explicit quantities, so a rule-based verifier can recompute the target answer.
Provided answer_text="504" appears inconsistent with the stated numbers, which lowers confidence in dataset label reliability.

decision_reasons: 题干、答案和图像资产齐全，核心语义可恢复，不应reject
题目可验证性和多步性尚可，具备进入候选池的基础价值
存在possible_answer_key_error风险，给定答案与题面数量关系可能不一致
存在provided_choice_set_may_be_inconsistent_with_problem_text风险，建议后续人工复核后再提升优先级
